meta.notes:
Keeps the StoryLoft Supabase free-tier project active by pinging the REST endpoint every 5 days (Supabase pauses after 7 days of inactivity).

Required n8n environment variables:
  STORYLOFT_SUPABASE_URL  — e.g. https://abcdefgh.supabase.co
  STORYLOFT_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY — the project anon/public key

To add alert on failure: extend the 'Log Failure' node to POST to a Slack webhook or send an email via the existing Brevo credential.
